mapper.select: select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from attendance_record where id = #{id}
select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from attendance_record
select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from attendance_record where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into attendance_record (user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkInType}, #{checkInStatus}, #{checkInLocation}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
